_comment: NPC: Dao Devil Sect Master (道魔宗主). Canon ID: N122. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Dao Devil Sect Master
personality: devil-aspected sect master; Wang Lin annihilated the sect

perception_tiers.core_formation: Dao Devil Sect Master; Third Step+
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Third Step+; Wang Lin annihilated this sect

note: Dao Devil Sect Master; sect annihilated by Wang Lin (canon-attested destruction)

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
